cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation

cards.name: Ⅷ Strength, reversed
cards.interpretation: self-doubt, weakness, low confidence, inadequacy, cowardice, forcefulness

cards.name: ⅩⅢ Death, reversed
cards.interpretation: fear of change, repeating negative patterns, resisting change, stagnancy, decay
